--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -82,63 +82,41 @@
         logits = self.out(h)

         return logits

 

-class DKT_Concat_GRU_LN(nn.Module):

+class DKT_Concat_GRU_DeepOut(nn.Module):

     def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.2):

         super().__init__()

         self.num_skills = num_skills

         self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)

         self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)

-        self.ln1 = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim * 2)

         rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0

         self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)

-        self.ln2 = nn.LayerNorm(hidden_dim)

-        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

+        self.out = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(dropout),

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

+        )

         self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

         

     def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):

         s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)

         c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)

         x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb], dim=-1)

-        x = self.ln1(x)

         x = self.dropout(x)

         h, _ = self.gru(x)

-        h = self.ln2(h)

         h = self.dropout(h)

         logits = self.out(h)

         return logits

 

-class DKT_SkillEmb(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.2):

-        super().__init__()

-        self.num_skills = num_skills

-        self.interaction_emb = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills, embed_dim)

-        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)

-        rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0

-        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(embed_dim, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)

-        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim + embed_dim, 1)

-        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

-        

-    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, next_skills):

-        interactions = skill_ids + corrects * self.num_skills

-        x = self.interaction_emb(interactions)

-        x = self.dropout(x)

-        h, _ = self.lstm(x)

-        h = self.dropout(h)

-        

-        next_s_emb = self.skill_emb(next_skills)

-        out_feat = torch.cat([h, next_s_emb], dim=-1)

-        logits = self.out(out_feat).squeeze(-1)

-        return logits

-

 class DKT_TargetEmb(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.4):

+    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=1, dropout=0.2):

         super().__init__()

         self.num_skills = num_skills

         self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)

         self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)

         rnn_dropout = dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0

         self.gru = nn.GRU(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=rnn_dropout)

-        

+        self.target_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)

         self.out = nn.Sequential(

             nn.Linear(hidden_dim + embed_dim, hidden_dim),

             nn.ReLU(),

@@ -155,54 +133,9 @@
         h, _ = self.gru(x)

         h = self.dropout(h)

         

-        next_s_emb = self.skill_emb(next_skills)

-        out_feat = torch.cat([h, next_s_emb], dim=-1)

-        logits = self.out(out_feat).squeeze(-1)

+        target_e = self.target_emb(next_skills)

+        target_e = self.dropout(target_e)

+        

+        combined = torch.cat([h, target_e], dim=-1)

+        logits = self.out(combined).squeeze(-1)

         return logits

-

-class SAKT(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, num_heads=8, dropout=0.2):

-        super().__init__()

-        self.num_skills = num_skills

-        self.embed_dim = embed_dim

-        self.interaction_emb = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills, embed_dim)

-        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)

-        self.pos_emb = nn.Embedding(1024, embed_dim)

-        

-        self.attn = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim, num_heads, dropout=dropout, batch_first=True)

-        self.ln1 = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim)

-        self.ln2 = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim)

-        

-        self.ffn = nn.Sequential(

-            nn.Linear(embed_dim, embed_dim * 4),

-            nn.ReLU(),

-            nn.Dropout(dropout),

-            nn.Linear(embed_dim * 4, embed_dim)

-        )

-        

-        self.out = nn.Linear(embed_dim, 1)

-        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

-        

-    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, next_skills):

-        device = skill_ids.device

-        seq_len = skill_ids.size(1)

-        

-        interactions = skill_ids + corrects * self.num_skills

-        v = self.interaction_emb(interactions)

-        

-        positions = torch.arange(seq_len, device=device).unsqueeze(0)

-        v = v + self.pos_emb(positions)

-        v = self.dropout(v)

-        

-        q = self.skill_emb(next_skills)

-        

-        mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(seq_len, seq_len, device=device), diagonal=1).bool()

-        

-        attn_out, _ = self.attn(q, v, v, attn_mask=mask)

-        attn_out = self.ln1(q + self.dropout(attn_out))

-        

-        ffn_out = self.ffn(attn_out)

-        out = self.ln2(attn_out + self.dropout(ffn_out))

-        

-        logits = self.out(out).squeeze(-1)

-        return logits
